sources.collection_focus: School-holiday and summer activities for children and young people, plus relevant public events.
sources.collection_instructions: Start with the lov activities page, then check https://www.sundbyberg.se/arkiv/evenemang-och-aktiviteter. Capture title, dates, times, age, place, cost, booking requirements, deadlines, and the exact source URL.
sources.gathering_notes: Use both the focused lov page and the broader event archive.

sources.collection_focus: Summer and holiday programs, libraries, culture, sports, outdoor activities, and family events.
sources.collection_instructions: Follow summer, lov, event-calendar, library, culture, and recreation links. Capture dates, age fit, location, cost, booking details, and source URL.
sources.gathering_notes: Prefer current-season overview pages before individual event pages.

sources.collection_focus: Summer activities, libraries, sports, culture, parks, swimming, and child-friendly events in Solna.
sources.collection_instructions: Check current news and linked activity calendars from Uppleva & göra. Preserve dates, time, age, weather limitations, price, booking, and source URL.
sources.gathering_notes: Look for a current-year consolidated summer page.

sources.collection_focus: Holiday activities, events, libraries, sports, culture, nature, and family destinations in Täby.
sources.collection_instructions: Follow lov, calendar, library, culture, sports, and outdoor links. Record dates, age, address, cost, booking details, and exact URL.
sources.gathering_notes: Prioritize options practical for a family day trip.

sources.collection_focus: Family events, culture, nature, recreation, holiday activities, and seasonal programs in Huddinge.
sources.collection_instructions: Search or filter for children, family, summer, and school-holiday activities. Capture occurrence dates, age, venue, price, booking, and URL.
sources.gathering_notes: Favor grouped programs and events with clear practical information.

sources.collection_focus: Summer and holiday activities, libraries, sports, culture, nature, beaches, and family events in Haninge.
sources.collection_instructions: Follow lov, event, library, culture, sports, and outdoor pages. Preserve eligibility, dates, age, location, cost, booking details, and URL.
sources.gathering_notes: Include strong nature or archipelago day-trip options when practical.

sources.collection_focus: Nearby holiday activities, events, libraries, sports, culture, nature, and family outings in Upplands-Bro.
sources.collection_instructions: Check lov and current event pages plus library, sports, and outdoor sections. Capture dates, age, location, cost, booking, and URL.
sources.gathering_notes: Treat this as a high-priority nearby municipality.

sources.collection_focus: Holiday activities, events, libraries, sports, culture, nature, and family programs in Upplands Väsby.
sources.collection_instructions: Follow current lov, calendar, library, culture, sports, and recreation links. Capture dates, age, address, cost, booking details, and URL.
sources.gathering_notes: Prioritize seasonal programs and useful nearby drop-in options.
